I’ve been a Revolut user for years, but now they’re demanding UK residency proof. I submitted my share code and photo multiple times, yet they claim they can’t verify it and ask for more. If you lack the technical capacity to verify official government data, that is not my fault. I will not keep sending documents; that’s exactly what the share code is for. Out of four banks I use, only Revolut shows this level of incompetence and hassle. It is impossible to trust or take this seriously.

They have an unfair commission for cafes and restaurants, which is around 30% of the cost. Previously, they used to return 10% in bonus points for purchases made without delivery. This meant that third-party partners and delivery services were not involved, so the app kept 20% just for providing the platform and service. At some point, that wasn't enough for them, and they decided to reduce the return to only 5%.
